target_compound: (unspecified — n=6 σ·τ=48T closed-form candidate from hexa-rtsc substrate)

reagents.grade_purity: No reagent set has been derived from the n=6 closed-form spec. The hexa-rtsc substrate (canon sha c0f1f570, 2026-05-06) provides only algebraic invariants (Tc=300K, Hc2=σ·τ=48T, Cooper φ=2, CN=6 Abrikosov lattice) — not a chemical recipe. This row is a schema-required placeholder.

conditions.atmosphere_gas: unspecified — no synthesis route has been demonstrated

provenance.source_citation: hexa-rtsc — Room-temperature superconductor substrate-of-substrates · n=6 invariant lattice · 48T SC coil · v1.1.0 (canon sha c0f1f570, 2026-05-06). The repo ships closed-form spec + falsifier preregister + 43/43 verifier closure, but explicitly: 'v1.0.0 ships spec + falsifier preregister only — no working empirical sandbox. RT-SC is academically unproven.' DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20102616.

scope_caveats: No experimental synthesis route has been demonstrated; this record exists ONLY to register the candidate spec for §8.7 Tier 2-4 future ingestion.

The hexa-rtsc substrate is algebraic-closed-form: it specifies what an n=6 RTSC would have to satisfy (Tc=300K · Hc2=σ·τ=48T · Cooper φ=2 · CN=6 Abrikosov lattice · 43/43 verifier closure between numerics and BCS/Abrikosov/WHH/McMillan/Allen-Dynes algebra). It does NOT specify which compound, which stoichiometry, or which fabrication route realises that closed form.
target_compound is intentionally 'unspecified' — assigning a compound here would be a fabrication (in both senses). The candidate is a spec-without-material.

replicated_by_independent_labs=0 is permanent until an empirical sandbox lands. Per RTSC.md §8.8 (g3 honest stance): RTSC-class claims never reach absorbed=true through Tier 4 falsifier dispatch alone. Tier 4 verdict can only ever say 'closed-form consistent' — never 'empirically realised'.

gate_type=empirically-unproven is the canonical label for this category (RTSC.md §8.6 deferred item: 'hexa-rtsc n=6 후보를 absorbed=false · provisional=true · gate_type=empirically-unproven 로 import'). This record fulfils that deferred line item for the hexa-rtsc n=6 side.

gate_type=empirically-unproven is used because no empirical claim has been made — only a closed-form spec exists. Sibling claim-only records (in the RTSC.md §8.9 5-criteria gate matrix) carry gate_type=claim-only.

duration_hours=0.0 and a degenerate single-point temperature_profile_c are schema-required placeholders. The schema's Conditions struct has no nullable variant; these zeros encode 'not applicable' and must not be interpreted as a 25°C ambient-pressure room-temperature reaction.
